## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `make check` passed, or skipped checks are listed below
- [ ] `make compose-config` passed when Docker/Compose config changed
- [ ] Docs updated when behavior, setup, or architecture changed
- [ ] Security-sensitive behavior reviewed when sandbox, auth, generated code, or data-source handling changed

## Notes

Call out migrations, breaking changes, follow-up work, or known limitations.
